title: London based design & build company looking to hire an expert
excerpt: Hi there, my team just joined Monday.com and we’re looking for an expert or consultant to set us up on the platform. We’re a design and build company based in London, UK - working on mainly residential extensions and ref…

posts.author: alyssrossi (Alyssa Rossi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, my team just joined Monday.com and we’re looking for an expert or consultant to set us up on the platform. We’re a design and build company based in London, UK - working on mainly residential extensions and refurbishments. We really want to use Monday.com to its full potential, and we love a good automative system! If someone is able to assist with this, please send me a message and we can discuss more.

Thank you,
Alyssa

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @alyssrossi

Welcome to the monday.com community! Getting set up can be a difficult undertaking and I am glad you’ve looked to the community for some help. CarbonWeb has been working with companies to set up their workflows component-by-component. Additionally, we have worked with a similar company here in the states and I believe we may have a lot set up already that might be applicable to your business.

I’d be happy to extend a free one-hour consultation to see what might be possible. Feel free to schedule some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you begin your monday.com experience!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

11997×2917 857 KB

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alyssrossi! Welcome to the monday.com community!

I’ve worked with quite a few architect and remodeling businesses on setting up Monday.com and would love to sit down with you and discuss your specific needs and hopes for getting the most out of Monday.com, and I’d be happy to share some of the success stories from my clients in working together on Monday.com.

I am based in California, but I work with a handful of UK clients, and we find ways to work around the time difference.

If you’d like to schedule a call to discuss more you can do so at this link: Calendly - Tim Little

Best Regards!

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alyssrossi

I’m a British monday.com Expert based in London.

Let me know if you need any help with monday.com.

You can visit my website here too: https://fiftytechsolutions.com/

Thanks,

Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com
